---
title: "Mælaborð íslenzkra ralla"
output: flexdashboard::flex_dashboard
runtime: shiny
---

```{r installations, eval = FALSE}
# INSTALLATIONS - YOU ONLY NEED TO DO THIS ONCE (ONCE IN A WHILE) --------------
# further info, see: https://heima.hafro.is/~einarhj/pkg/osmx

# install.packages("devtools")
# unlink(file.path(.libPaths(), '00LOCK-*'))
remotes::install_github("einarhjorleifsson/ovog")
remotes::install_github("einarhjorleifsson/osmx")

# This guy you hopefully installed recently, takes a while
remotes::install_local("R:/R/Pakkar/mardata", force = TRUE)
```

```{r get_data, eval = FALSE}
# RUN THIS CHUNK line-by-line each time you dumped data to a zip file from Hafvog
#  The paths to the zip-files (you may need to change this):
maelingar <- c("data-raw/TB1-2026.zip", "data-raw/TTH1-2026.zip", "data-raw/A4-2026.zip", "data-raw/Þ3-2026.zip")
stillingar <- "data-raw/stillingar_SMB_rall_(botnfiskur) 1.zip"
stodtoflur <- "data-raw/stodtoflur.zip"
#library(magrittr)
res <- osmx::sm_munge(maelingar, stillingar, stodtoflur)
if(!dir.exists(here::here("data2"))) dir.create(here::here("data2"))
res |> readr::write_rds(here::here("data2/res.rds"))
```

<!-- DO NOT FIDDLE WITH STUFF BELOW, JUST PRESS "Run Document" -->

```{r smxapp}
res <- readr::read_rds(here::here("data2/res.rds"))
# 2026 addendum - to be moved to {osmx}
res$le.this.year <- 
  res$stodvar |> 
  dplyr::filter(ar == max(ar)) |>
  dplyr::select(leidangur, synis_id, stod) |> 
  dplyr::inner_join(res$skraning |> 
                      # TODO: Check this
                      dplyr::filter(maeliadgerd %in% c(1, 2, 3)),
                    by = dplyr::join_by(leidangur, synis_id)) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(lest = stringr::str_sub(leidangur, 1, 4),
                lest = stringr::str_remove(lest, "-"),
                lest = paste0(lest, "-", stringr::str_pad(stod, width = 3, pad = "0"))) |> 
  dplyr::select(leidangur, lest, tegund, nr, lengd, kyn) |> 
  dplyr::left_join(res$qc$range |> 
                     dplyr::select(tegund, lengd_low, lengd_high) |> 
                     dplyr::distinct(),
                   by = dplyr::join_by(tegund)) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(.l.ok = dplyr::if_else(dplyr::between(lengd, lengd_low, lengd_high), "ok", "check", "na"),
                nr = as.integer(nr),
                lengd = as.integer(floor(lengd)),
                kyn = as.integer(kyn)) |> 
  dplyr::select(leidangur, lest, tegund, nr, lengd, kyn, .l.ok)
res$kv.this.year <-
  res$kv.this.year |> 
  dplyr::mutate(lengd = as.integer(lengd),
                oslaegt = as.integer(oslaegt),
                slaegt = as.integer(slaegt),
                lifur = as.integer(lifur),
                kynfaeri = as.integer(kynfaeri),
                kyn = as.integer(kyn),
                kynthroski = as.integer(kynthroski),
                magaastand = as.integer(magaastand),
                stod = as.integer(stod))
res$pp <- 
  res$pp |> 
  dplyr::mutate(lest = stringr::str_sub(leidangur, 1, 4),
                lest = stringr::str_remove(lest, "-"),
                lest = paste0(lest, "-", stringr::str_pad(stod, width = 3, pad = "0")),
                flengd = as.integer(flengd),
                oslaegt = as.integer(oslaegt),
                astand = as.integer(astand))

my.species <- as.list(res$tegundir$tegund)
names(my.species) <- paste0(stringr::str_pad(res$tegundir$tegund, width = 3, pad = "0"),
                            "-",
                            res$tegundir$name)
my.cruises <- as.list(res$leidangrar)
names(my.cruises) <- res$leidangrar
max.year <- max(res$stodvar$ar, na.rm = TRUE)
```

Sidebar {.sidebar data-width=175}
=====================================

```{r}
selectInput(inputId = "Species", label = "Tegund:",
            choices = my.species, selected = 1)


radioButtons(inputId = "Type", label = "Val:", 
             choices = list("Numbers", "Weight"),
             selected = list("Numbers"))

checkboxGroupInput(inputId = "Leidangur", label = "Leidangur:",
                   choices = my.cruises, selected = my.cruises)
```


Síðast uppfært: 

`r as.character(res$timi)`

ATH: Val á leiðangri ekki virkt í öllum gluggum.

Dót til prufu - um kóðann sem er á bak við má fræðast um nánar [hér](https://heima.hafro.is/~einarhj/older/gagnakvorn).



Forsíða
=====================================  

Column 
-------------------------------------

### Eftir lengd


```{r}
renderPlot({
  if(input$Type == "Numbers")
  {
    res$by.length |> 
      dplyr::filter(tegund == as.numeric(input$Species),
                    ar >= 2010) |> 
      dplyr::filter(var == "n") |> 
      osmx::sm_plot_lengths()
  } else {
    res$by.length |> 
      dplyr::filter(tegund == as.numeric(input$Species),
                    ar >= 2010) |> 
      dplyr::filter(var == "b") |> 
      osmx::sm_plot_lengths()
  }
})

```



Column 
-------------------------------------

### Meðalafli - hártogun með staðalvikmörkum


```{r}
renderPlot({
  if(input$Type == "Numbers") 
  {
    res$boot |> 
      dplyr::filter(tegund == input$Species,
                    var == "n") |> 
      osmx::sm_plot_boot()
  } else {
    res$boot |> 
      dplyr::filter(tegund == input$Species,
                    var == "b") |> 
      osmx::sm_plot_boot()
  }
})

```



### Afli í staðaltogi árið `r max.year`

```{r}
renderPlot({
  
  tmp <- 
    res$by.station |> 
    dplyr::filter(tegund == input$Species,
                  ar == max(ar))
  
  if(input$Type == "Numbers") {
    tmp |> 
      dplyr::filter(var == "n") |> 
      osmx::sm_plot_bubble()
  } else {
    tmp |> 
      dplyr::filter(var == "b") |> 
      osmx::sm_plot_bubble()
  }
})

```



Dreifing
=====================================

Column {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Afli í staðaltogi

```{r}
renderPlot({
  
  tmp <- 
    res$by.station |> 
    dplyr::filter(tegund == input$Species,
                  ar %in% c(seq(2000, 2015, by = 5),
                            2017:max.year))
  
  if(input$Type == "Numbers") {
    tmp |> 
      dplyr::filter(var == "n") |> 
      osmx::sm_plot_bubble()
  } else {
    tmp |> 
      dplyr::filter(var == "b") |> 
      osmx::sm_plot_bubble()
  }
})
```


### Tegund - Magn í reit

```{r}
renderPlot({
  if(input$Type == "Numbers") {
    res$by.rect |> 
      dplyr::filter(tegund == input$Species,
                    var == "n") |> 
      osmx::sm_plot_glyph()
  } else {
    res$by.rect |> 
      dplyr::filter(tegund == input$Species,
                    var == "b") |> 
      osmx::sm_plot_glyph()
  }
})
```




### Tegund - Líkur á veiði í reit

```{r}
renderPlot({
  tmp <- 
    res$by.station |> 
    dplyr::filter(ar == max(ar), tegund == input$Species, var == "n") |> 
    dplyr::mutate(val = ifelse(val == 0, "absent", "present")) |> 
    dplyr::select(lon, lat, val)
  res$p_capture |> 
    dplyr::filter(tegund == input$Species) |> 
    osmx::sm_plot_probability() +
    ggplot2::geom_point(data = tmp, 
                        ggplot2::aes(lon, lat, colour = val),
                        size = 2) +
    ggplot2::scale_colour_manual(values = c("present" = "cyan", "absent" = "white"),
                                 guide = "none")
})
```



Vikmörk-myndir
=====================================


Column {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Lengd-óslægt

```{r}
renderPlot({
  res |> osmx::sm_plot_length_ungutted(input$Species, input$Leidangur)
})

```

### Lengd-slægt

```{r}
renderPlot({
  res |> osmx::sm_plot_length_gutted(input$Species, input$Leidangur)
})

```

### Lengd-slægt/óslægt

```{r}
renderPlot({
  res |>  osmx::sm_plot_weights(input$Species, input$Leidangur)
})
```

### Lengd-lifur/óslaegt

```{r}
renderPlot({
  res |> osmx::sm_plot_liver(input$Species, input$Leidangur)
})

```

### Lengd-kynkirtlar/óslaegt

```{r}
renderPlot({
  res |> osmx::sm_plot_gonads(input$Species, input$Leidangur)
})
```



Vikmörk-tafla
=====================================

Column {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Lengdir - allar tegundir

```{r}
DT::renderDataTable({
  res$le.this.year |> 
    dplyr::filter(leidangur %in% input$Leidangur) |> 
    dplyr::filter(.l.ok != "ok") |> 
    dplyr::select(-leidangur) |> 
    DT::datatable(#filter = 'top',
                  rownames = FALSE,
                  options = list(dom = 't', paging = FALSE))
})
```

### Kvarnir - allar tegundir

```{r}
DT::renderDataTable({
  res$kv.this.year |> 
    dplyr::filter(leidangur %in% input$Leidangur) |> 
    dplyr::filter(.l_osl == "check" | .l_sl == 
                    "check" | .sl_osl == "check" | .kyn == "check" | .lif == 
                    "check") |> 
    #dplyr::filter(leidangur %in% input$Leidangur) |> 
    dplyr::select(lest, tegund, nr, lengd, oslaegt, slaegt, kynfaeri, 
                  lifur, .l_osl, .l_sl, .sl_osl, .kyn, .lif) |> 
    DT::datatable(#filter = 'top',
                  rownames = FALSE,
                  options = list(dom = 't', paging = FALSE))
})
```

Magar
=====================================

Column {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Mælingar á bráð

```{r}
DT::renderDataTable({
  res$pp |> 
    #dplyr::filter(leidangur %in% input$Leidangur) |>
    dplyr::select(lest, fiskur:heildarthyngd) |> 
    DT::datatable(#filter = 'top',
                  rownames = FALSE,
                  options = list(dom = 't', paging = FALSE))
})
```

### Þyngdardreifing á bráð - Topp 20 bráðir

```{r}
renderPlot({
  pp <- 
    res$pp |> 
    dplyr::filter(astand == 1,
                  # brað verdur ad vera skilgreind
                  !is.na(prey),
                  # verður að hafa mælingu thyngd
                  !is.na(heildarthyngd),
                  # verður að hafa mælingu talid
                  !is.na(n)) |> 
    dplyr::mutate(m.thyngd = round(heildarthyngd / n, 2))
  
  # not really mean based on individual prey measurements
  pp.mean <- 
    pp |> 
    dplyr::group_by(prey) |> 
    dplyr::summarise(fjoldi = sum(n),
                     mean = sum(heildarthyngd) / sum(n)) |> 
    dplyr::ungroup() |> 
    dplyr::arrange(-fjoldi)
  
  # top 20 (bráð) tegundir "mældar"
  top20 <-
    pp.mean |> 
    dplyr::slice(1:20)
  top20.brad <-
    top20 |> 
    dplyr::pull(prey)
  
  pp |> 
    dplyr::filter(leidangur %in% input$Leidangur) |> 
    dplyr::filter(prey %in% top20.brad) |> 
    ggplot2::ggplot() +
    ggplot2::geom_histogram(ggplot2::aes(m.thyngd)) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(data = top20, 
                        ggplot2::aes(xintercept = mean), colour = "red") +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ prey, scale = "free") +
    ggplot2::labs(x = "Meðalþyngd", y = "Fjöldi")
})
```


### Samantekt per fisk

```{r}
DT::renderDataTable({
  res$pp |> 
    dplyr::filter(leidangur %in% input$Leidangur) |> 
    dplyr::group_by(leidangur, stod, fiskur, fnr, flengd, oslaegt, astand ) |> 
    dplyr::reframe(n = sum(n, na.rm = TRUE),
                   wt = sum(heildarthyngd, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(magafylli = round(wt / oslaegt, 3)) |> 
    DT::datatable(#filter = 'top',
                  rownames = FALSE,
                  options = list(dom = 't', paging = FALSE))
})
```

### Dreifing á magafylli eftir tegundum

```{r}
renderPlot({
  tmp <- 
    res$pp |> 
    dplyr::filter(leidangur %in% input$Leidangur) |> 
    dplyr::group_by(leidangur, stod, fiskur, fnr, flengd, oslaegt, astand ) |> 
    dplyr::reframe(n = sum(n, na.rm = TRUE),
                   wt = sum(heildarthyngd, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(magafylli = round(wt / oslaegt, 3)) 
  tmp |> 
    ggplot2::ggplot() +
    ggplot2::geom_histogram(ggplot2::aes(magafylli)) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ fiskur, scales = "free")
})
```

### Stop making sense

```{r}
DT::renderDataTable({
  res$pp |> 
    dplyr::filter(leidangur == input$Leidangur) |> 
    dplyr::mutate(
      check = dplyr::case_when(
        astand == 1 & is.na(heildarthyngd) ~ "engin heildarþyngd",
        astand == 1 & heildarthyngd == 0 ~ "bráð 0 grömm",
        astand == 2 & heildarthyngd > 0 ~ "tómur en með þyngd",
        .default = NA)) |> 
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(check)) |> 
    dplyr::select(check, lest, fiskur:heildarthyngd) |> 
    DT::datatable(#filter = 'top',
                  rownames = FALSE,
                  options = list(dom = 't', paging = FALSE))
})
```



Togupplýsingar
=====================================

Column {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Lögun - síðustu 20 stöðvar

```{r}
renderPlot({
  res$timetrend.20 |> 
    dplyr::filter(leidangur %in% input$Leidangur,
                  var %in% c("larett_opnun", "lodrett_opnun", "vir_uti")) |> 
    osmx::sm_plot_last20()
})
```

### Umhverfi - síðustu 20 stöðvar

```{r}
renderPlot({
  res$timetrend.20 |> 
    dplyr::filter(leidangur %in% input$Leidangur,
                  var %in% c("botnhiti", "yfirbordshiti")) |> 
    osmx::sm_plot_last20()
})
```

### Tímatrend - lögun

```{r}
renderPlot({
  res$timetrend |> 
    dplyr::filter(leidangur %in% input$Leidangur,
                  var %in% c("larett_opnun", "lodrett_opnun", "vir_uti")) |> 
    osmx::sm_plot_violin()
  
})
```

### Tímatrend - umhverfi

```{r}
renderPlot({
  res$timetrend |> 
    dplyr::filter(leidangur %in% input$Leidangur,
                  var %in% c("botnhiti", "yfirbordshiti")) |> 
    osmx::sm_plot_violin()
  
})
```


Surf and turf
=====================================

Column {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Togfar

```{r}
leaflet::renderLeaflet({
  m <- 
    mapview::mapview(res$sf$sf_handbok, map.types = c("Esri.OceanBasemap"),
                     legend = FALSE,
                     color = "green",
                     lwd = 10) +
    mapview::mapview(res$sf$sf_older,
                     legend = FALSE,
                     popup = FALSE,
                     zcol = "ar") +
    mapview::mapview(res$sf$sf_this_year,
                     legend = FALSE,
                     zcol = "stod",
                     color = "red",
                     lwd = 8)
  m@map
})

```



Af aflabrögðum
=====================================

Column {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Afli

```{r}
DT::renderDataTable({
  now.year <- max(res$stodvar$ar)
  x <- 
    res$by.station |> 
    dplyr::filter(ar == now.year) |> 
    dplyr::left_join(res$stodvar |> 
                       dplyr::filter(ar == now.year) |> 
                       dplyr::select(index, leidangur)) |> 
    dplyr::group_by(leidangur, tegund, var) |> 
    dplyr::summarise(value = round(sum(val), 0),
                     .groups = "drop") |> 
    dplyr::filter(value > 0) |> 
    dplyr::mutate(variable = paste0(var, ".", leidangur)) |> 
    dplyr::ungroup() |> 
    dplyr::select(-leidangur) |> 
    tidyr::spread(variable, value) |>
    dplyr::left_join(res$tegundir) |> 
    dplyr::mutate(tegund = paste(tegund, name)) |> 
    dplyr::select(-name)
  if(input$Type == "Numbers") {
    x |> 
      dplyr::select(tegund, starts_with("n.")) |> 
      tidyr::drop_na() |> 
    DT::datatable(#filter = 'top',
                  rownames = FALSE,
                  options = list(dom = 't', paging = FALSE))
  } else {
    x |> 
      dplyr::select(tegund, starts_with("b.")) |> 
      tidyr::drop_na() |> 
    DT::datatable(#filter = 'top',
                  rownames = FALSE,
                  options = list(dom = 't', paging = FALSE))
  }
  
})

```

```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = FALSE)
```


```{r}
renderPlot({
  
  MAELINGAR |> 
    ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(rel.time, n.cum, colour = leidangur)) +
    ggplot2::theme_grey(base_size = 16) +
    ggplot2::geom_step(lwd = 1) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ heiti, scale = "free_y") +
    ggplot2::expand_limits(y = 0) +
    ggplot2::labs(x = "Dagar frá fyrstu stöð",
                  y = "Fjöldi",
                  colour = "Leiðangur") +
    ggplot2::scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1")
})
```


```{r}
renderPlot({
  
  skr <- 
    readr::read_rds("data2/res.rds")$skraning |> 
    dplyr::filter(tegund == input$Species) |> 
    dplyr::group_by(synis_id, maeliadgerd) |> 
    dplyr::summarise(n = sum(fjoldi)) |> 
    dplyr::ungroup()
  st2 <- 
    st |> 
    dplyr::filter(ar == now.year) |> 
    dplyr::select(synis_id,
                  leidangur,
                  time = togbyrjun) |> 
    dplyr::group_by(leidangur) |> 
    dplyr::mutate(start.time = min(time),
                  rel.time = as.numeric(time - start.time) / (60 * 60 * 24),
                  max.time = max(rel.time)) |> 
    dplyr::select(leidangur, rel.time, max.time, synis_id) |> 
    dplyr::ungroup() |> 
    dplyr::left_join(skr) |> 
    dplyr::arrange(rel.time) |> 
    tidyr::complete(rel.time, tidyr::nesting(leidangur, maeliadgerd), 
                    fill = list(n = 0)) |> 
    dplyr::group_by(rel.time, leidangur) |> 
    tidyr::fill(max.time) |> 
    dplyr::filter(rel.time <= max.time) |> 
    dplyr::arrange(rel.time) |> 
    dplyr::left_join(maeliatridi) |> 
    dplyr::group_by(leidangur, heiti) |> 
    dplyr::mutate(n.cum = cumsum(n)) |> 
    dplyr::ungroup()
  
  
  st2 |> 
    ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(rel.time, n.cum, colour = leidangur)) +
    ggplot2::geom_step(lwd = 1) +
    ggplot2::theme_grey(base_size = 16) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ heiti, scale = "free_y") +
    ggplot2::expand_limits(y = 0) +
    ggplot2::labs(x = "Dagar frá fyrstu stöð",
                  y = "Fjöldi",
                  colour = "Leiðangur") +
    ggplot2::scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1")
})
```
